mapper.select: SELECT e.*, a.username as admin_name, (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM db_evaluation WHERE equipment_id = e.id AND status = 1) as avg_rating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM db_evaluation WHERE equipment_id = e.id AND status = 1) as evaluation_count FROM db_equipment e LEFT JOIN db_account a ON e.admin_id = a.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
